title: Digital Marketing
sub_title: Gain In-Demand Skills and Real-World Project Experience
description: From Basics to Mastery: Courses Designed for Every Level

introData.header: Digital marketing has become a game-changer in today’s business landscape. With billions of people actively engaging online, businesses are shifting to digital platforms to connect with potential customers. The global digital advertising market is expected to exceed $786.2 billion by 2026. If you want to master online marketing strategies, enhance your business reach, or establish yourself as a professional digital marketer, this course is the perfect stepping stone.
introData.title: Level Up Your Skills
introData.sub_title: Turn Your Passion into a Profession with WiztecBD Training!

course_overview.title: Course Overview
course_overview.overview: Becoming a skilled digital marketer requires expertise in multiple areas. WiztecBD’s Digital Marketing Course provides in-depth training on essential topics like SEO, social media marketing, email marketing, paid advertising, and marketplace strategies. You’ll gain hands-on experience with industry-leading tools, empowering you to drive business growth and career success.

title: Artificial Intelligence
sub_title: Gain In-Demand Skills and Real-World Project Experience
description: From Basics to Mastery: Courses Designed for Every Level

introData.header: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is transforming industries worldwide, driving innovation in automation, data analysis, and decision-making. From chatbots to self-driving cars, AI is shaping the future of technology. The global AI market is expected to reach $1.8 trillion by 2030, making AI expertise a highly valuable skill. If you want to develop cutting-edge AI models, work on real-world machine learning projects, or explore deep learning techniques, this course is your gateway to the future.
introData.title: Level Up Your Skills
introData.sub_title: Turn Your Passion into a Profession with WiztecBD Training!

course_overview.title: Course Overview
course_overview.overview: To become an AI professional, mastering machine learning, deep learning, and data science is essential. WiztecBD’s AI Course covers everything from Python programming to neural networks and AI-driven applications. Through hands-on projects, industry-level case studies, and expert mentorship, you will gain the skills needed to build, train, and deploy AI models effectively.

title: Data Analytics
sub_title: Gain In-Demand Skills and Real-World Project Experience
description: From Basics to Mastery: Courses Designed for Every Level

introData.header: Data is the new fuel of the digital era, and organizations rely on data analytics to drive business decisions. From e-commerce to healthcare, every industry depends on data to improve efficiency and predict future trends. The global big data analytics market is expected to surpass $650 billion by 2029, making data analysts one of the most in-demand professionals. If you want to learn how to process, analyze, and visualize data to generate valuable insights, this course is your gateway to a data-driven career.
introData.title: Level Up Your Skills
introData.sub_title: Turn Your Passion into a Profession with WiztecBD Training!

course_overview.title: Course Overview
course_overview.overview: Becoming a skilled Data Analyst requires expertise in data processing, visualization, and statistical analysis. WiztecBD’s Data Analytics Course provides hands-on training in tools like Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel, enabling you to work with large datasets, extract insights, and present data in a meaningful way. You will learn real-world problem-solving techniques and data storytelling, ensuring you stand out in the job market.

title: Governance of Enterprise IT (CGEIT)
sub_title: Digital Entrepreneurship and Innovation Eco-System Development Project (DEIEDP)
description: Authorized by Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority(BHTPA)

introData.header: Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority(BHTPA), under the Digital Entrepreneurship and Innovation Eco-System Development Project (DEIEDP), is thrilled to announce a transformative training program on 4IR (Fourth Industrial Revolution)Technologies. This comprehensive training initiative is designed to enhance the skills of graduates and professionals, preparing them for high-value roles in IT/ITES and equipping them with globally recognized certifications.
introData.title: Training Program on 4IR (Fourth Industrial Revolution)Technologies
introData.sub_title: Certification: Certified in Governance of Enterprise IT (CGEIT)

course_overview.title: Program Overview
course_overview.overview: This training program provides specialized, hands-on learning in the latest 4IR technologies, specifically tailored for individuals looking to advance in the IT/ITES sector. With dedicated support, career counseling, and job placement assistance, participants will gain skills and qualifications that are in high demand in the industry.

title: Data Analytics (CAP®)
sub_title: Digital Entrepreneurship and Innovation Eco-System Development Project (DEIEDP)
description: Authorized by Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority(BHTPA)

introData.header: Bangladesh Hi-Tech Park Authority(BHTPA), under the Digital Entrepreneurship and Innovation Eco-System Development Project (DEIEDP), is thrilled to announce a transformative training program on 4IR (Fourth Industrial Revolution)Technologies. This comprehensive training initiative is designed to enhance the skills of graduates and professionals, preparing them for high-value roles in IT/ITES and equipping them with globally recognized certifications.
introData.title: Training Program on 4IR (Fourth Industrial Revolution)Technologies

course_overview.title: Program Overview
course_overview.overview: This training program provides specialized, hands-on learning in the latest 4IR technologies, specifically tailored for individuals looking to advance in the IT/ITES sector. With dedicated support, career counseling, and job placement assistance, participants will gain skills and qualifications that are in high demand in the industry.

list.title: 95% Tuition Subsidy
list.description: Training costs are largely covered by DEIEDP-BHTPA, with participants only required to contribute 5%.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Live Q&A & Review Sessions.webp

list.title: 5% Tuition Fee Contribution
list.description: A total of 5% (5000 tk approx.) of the tuition fee has to be paid before the starting of the training session.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Lifetime Learning Support.webp

list.title: Certification Fees Reimbursement
list.description: Certification fees are fully reimbursed upon passing the exam, allowing you to earn internationally recognized credentials at no additional cost.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Hands-on Coding Labs.webp

list.title: Job Placement Assistance
list.description: The program includes job-matching and freelance support, with a focus on placing participants in relevant roles within STPs, HTPs, and their supply chains.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Career Placement Assistance.webp

list.title: Soft Skills Development
list.description: Receive training in essential workplace skills, including communication, teamwork, and leadership.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Class Recordings for Flexible Learning.webp

list.title: Hands-On Industry Projects
list.description: Practical, project-based learning in real-world industry scenarios ensures job-ready skills.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Exclusive Solutions That Set Us Apart/Virtual Internship Opportunity.webp

list.title: Job Seekers specialized in IT/ITES fields and business management.
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/This Course is Designed For/Aspiring Software Developers & Engineers.webp

list.title: Current Employees working in IT/ITES firms or supply chains and business management
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/This Course is Designed For/Students & Job Seekers.webp

list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/This Course is Designed For/Freelancers & Entrepreneurs.webp

list.description: 2 years of analytics work experience with MA/MS degree or higher
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Career Opportunities/Software development.webp

list.description: or 4 years of analytics work experience with BA/BS degree
list.icon: /assets/icons/CoursePage/Software Development Course/Career Opportunities/Freelancing on platforms.webp
